enum_values.name: CategorySplitted
enum_values.summary: CategorySplitted - For this case we will be using just the last Category (the last word after the dot separator in FullCategoryName)

enum_values.name: Description
enum_values.summary: Description - The description of the node

enum_values.name: FullCategoryName
enum_values.summary: FullCategoryName - The category of the node

enum_values.name: Name
enum_values.summary: Name - The name of the node

enum_values.name: NameSplitted
enum_values.summary: NameSplitted - The name of the node splitted using just the last part (e.g. List.Chop we will be using just Chop)

enum_values.name: Parameters
enum_values.summary: Node Input Parameters as string (there are nodes with same name and category but different parameters)

enum_values.name: SearchKeywords
enum_values.summary: SearchKeywords - Several keywords that will be used when searching any word (this values are coming from xml files like BuiltIn.xml, DesignScriptBuiltin.xml or ProtoGeometry.xml)
